arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' remarkably honest admission over his strongest team ahead of West Brom and Burnley
arts.sum: John Mousinho has admitted he’s still searching for his strongest Pompey starting XI.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth EA Sports FC 25 Ratings: Full squad confirmed including Bishop, Yengi, Pack, and Murphy
arts.sum: Pompey's player ratings for the latest EA Sports FC game have been published online ahead of its release later this month.

arts.ttl: Ex-Portsmouth and Sheffield Wednesday man Mark Chamberlain: Liverpool star injured me on purpose in FA Cup semi-final - I have proof
arts.sum: Mark Chamberlain is adamant Ronnie Whelan was on a mission to injure him in the 1992 FA Cup semi-final - and claims a Liverpool player has confirmed it.

arts.ttl: 'I don’t think anyone is hiding away from that': why Portsmouth need time to adapt to Championship - despite Leeds and Luton draws
arts.sum: The realities of the 2024 transfer window have contributed to Pompey requiring extra time to adapt to life in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Carlos Corberan press conference notes: Nestor talks, Racic option and West Brom headache - Joseph Chapman - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aside from Daryl Dike, and perhaps Jayson Molumby - although his issue is potentially a minor one - Corberan is leading his side to Portsmouth this weekend knowing he'll have to leave a handful of first-team players out of the 20-strong group which is named on the match-day team-sheet. Albion have begun the campaign impressively, and now have a squad which appears to have struck a balance; after the additions of Mikey Johnston and Mason Holgate on transfer deadline day, Corberan has a depth of quality and numbers in personnel.

arts.ttl: How Portsmouth's stunning Fratton Park attendances compare with Sunderland, Leeds and Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Pompey once again prepare to welcome Championship rivals to Fratton Park as EFL returns this weekend

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' challenge to emerging midfield starlet as West Brom clamour grows
arts.sum: Abdoulaye Kamara has been tasked with fulfilling his promise in the Championship as calls grow for the midfielder to be let loose on Pompey’s rivals.

arts.ttl: Grady Diangana injury update as Carlos Corberan reveals West Brom's 'small problem'
arts.sum: Daryl Dike remains a long-term absentee who is due to return later this year, but the only other issue lies with Jayson Molumby; the midfielder was away in the international break representing Ireland, against England and Greece in the Nations League, but he is nursing a foot problem - although Corberan hasn't ruled him out of Sunday's fixture at Fratton Park. "He arrived back after the international break with a problem in the foot - the other foot to the one he had an injury in before," Corberan said.
